title: thelypodium laciniatum var. streptanthoides
intro: Thelypodium laciniatum var. streptanthoides, also known as Streptanthus streptanthoides, is a rare plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to the western United States. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypodium laciniatum var. streptanthoides include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various skin conditions and wounds.
